creator: smith8395john@gmail.com
text:
You can use your AOL email on any of your email applications or devices. However, not all of these applications will support automatic setup and you might have to enter the email settings on your own. Given below we have mentioned the procedure to configure your AOL Email settings on Outlook 2016, Outlook 2013, Outlook 2010, and even Outlook for Microsoft 365 using the automatic setup. Follow the steps below to add your AOL account to Outlook.

Go to File and select Add Account.
If you are using Outlook for Microsoft 365 or Outlook 2016, you need to enter your email address in the given space and then hit the Connect button.
If you are running Outlook 13 or Outlook 10, then you need to enter your name, username (email address), and password in the given fields. Hit next once you are done.
You might get the prompt to enter your Roadrunner password once again. Enter the password and then click on OK and then Finish.

https://www.emailsupport.us/blog/aol-email-settings-using-imap
